title: 67% Incident Rate Reduction — Major Oil & Gas Operator
headline: 67% Incident Rate Reduction
description: A major offshore operator was experiencing a rising TRIFR and repeated regulatory notices. Deployed full HSE consulting engagement: cultural assessment, revised safety management system, leadership coaching, and contractor management overhaul.

title: Triple ISO Certification in 11 Months — Manufacturing Facility
headline: Triple ISO Certification in 11 Months
description: A 600-person manufacturing facility needed ISO 45001, ISO 14001, and ISO 9001 certification to secure a major client contract. Started from no formal management system. Delivered full IMS implementation, documentation, gap analysis, internal audits, and Stage 2 certification — zero non-conformances.

title: 97% NEBOSH Pass Rate — Corporate Training Program
headline: 97% First-Attempt Pass Rate
description: A major construction group engaged Ansar to deliver NEBOSH IGC coaching for 84 safety managers across 6 countries. Programme included customised study materials, weekly coaching sessions, mock exams, and tailored feedback. Delivered fully online over 12 weeks.

title: Enterprise Power BI Dashboard — 14-Site Construction Group
headline: Live Safety Data Across 14 Sites
description: An Australian construction group had safety data scattered across 14 project sites in Excel, SharePoint, and three different contractor systems. Designed and built a Power BI enterprise safety dashboard consolidating all sources — live incident tracking, near-miss trends, training compliance, and contractor performance.

title: AI Incident Analysis Tool — Logistics Corporation
headline: 5 Years of Data Analysed in Days
description: A European logistics corporation had 5 years of incident data in disparate spreadsheets — never systematically analysed. Built a custom AI tool combining NLP and pattern recognition to categorise incidents, identify root cause trends, predict high-risk periods, and auto-generate executive reports.

title: Incident Investigation & Corrective Action — Manufacturing Plant
headline: Systemic Issues Identified After 5 Years
description: Following a lost-time injury at a Singapore manufacturing plant, deployed on-site within 24 hours. Conducted full ICAM investigation: evidence gathering, witness interviews, timeline reconstruction, systemic cause analysis, and CAPA plan. Report delivered in 72 hours; regulatory notification prepared and submitted.
